channel.title: テック速報 AI ニュースラジオ
channel.description: AIが届ける毎朝のテック＆経済ニュースダイジェスト。元記事の著作権は各メディアに帰属します。
channel.itunes:author: Auto Podcast Generator
channel.itunes:summary: AIが届ける毎朝のテック＆経済ニュースダイジェスト。元記事の著作権は各メディアに帰属します。

item.title: 第7話 - テック速報 AI ニュースラジオ (2026-02-24)
item.description:
配信日: 2026-02-24 出演: ヒナタ & ソウタ
本日のニュースソース: ASCII.jp － トップ、Ars Technica - All content、CNET Japan 最新情報 総合、GIGAZINE、Hacker News: Front Page、ITmedia NEWS 最新記事一覧、Impress Watch、Publickey、TechCrunch、Yahoo!ニュース・トピックス - 経済、ロイター トップニュース、日経ビジネス電子版 最新記事、経済・マネー - 朝日新聞 （51件の記事をもとに構成）
参照元記事: - https://www.itmedia.co.jp/news/articles/2602/23/news014.html - https://www.publickey1.jp/blog/26/nistaiai_agent_standards_initiative.html - https://www.publickey1.jp/blog/26/anthropicclaude_code_security.html - https://gigazine.net/news/20260224-wine-reviews-personality-abv-bert/ - https://gigazine.net/news/20260223-mozambique-honey-hunters-birds-language/ - https://gigazine.net/news/20260223-glances/ - https://gigazine.net/news/20260223-puget-bench-davinci-resolve/ - https://gigazine.net/news/20260223-evangelion-new-series/ - https://japan.cnet.com/article/35244213/ - https://japan.cnet.com/article/35244185/ - https://www.watch.impress.co.jp/docs/series/itsmo/2086514.html - https://ascii.jp/elem/000/004/375/4375796/?rss - https://ascii.jp/elem/000/004/375/4375795/?rss - https://ascii.jp/elem/000/004/375/4375570/?rss - https://ascii.jp/elem/000/004/375/4375424/?rss - https://ascii.jp/elem/000/004/374/4374398/?rss - https://techcrunch.com/2026/02/23/ex-apple-team-launches-acme-weather-a-new-take-on-weather-forecasting/ - https://techcrunch.com/2026/02/23/anthropic-accuses-chinese-ai-labs-of-mining-claude-as-us-debates-ai-chip-exports/ - https://techcrunch.com/2026/02/23/uber-autonomous-solutions-av-robotaxi/ - https://techcrunch.com/2026/02/23/googles-cloud-ai-lead-on-the-three-frontiers-of-model-capability/ - https://techcrunch.com/2026/02/23/americans-are-destroying-flock-surveillance-cameras/ - https://arstechnica.com/gaming/2026/02/new-microsoft-gaming-chief-has-no-tolerance-for-bad-ai/ - https://arstechnica.com/cars/2026/02/the-2026-mazda-cx-5-driven-it-got-bigger-plus-radical-tech-upgrade/ - https://arstechnica.com/ai/2026/02/ais-can-generate-near-verbatim-copies-of-novels-from-training-data/ - https://arstechnica.com/culture/2026/02/review-knight-of-the-seven-kingdoms-brings-back-that-westeros-magic/ - https://arstechnica.com/features/2026/02/the-first-cars-bold-enough-to-drive-themselves/ - https://thenevadaindependent.com/article/vegas-police-are-big-users-of-license-plate-readers-public-has-little-input-because-its-a-gift - https://www.zerohedge.com/markets/ibm-plunges-after-anthropics-latest-update-takes-cobol - https://videocardz.com/newz/stop-killing-games-update-says-eu-petition-advances - https://www.ycombinator.com/companies/sim/jobs/Rj8TVRM-software-engineer-platform - https://www.colino.net/wordpress/archives/2026/02/23/the-challenges-of-porting-shufflepuck-cafe-to-the-8-bits-apple-ii/ - https://business.nikkei.com/atcl/audio/22/00001/022000819/ - https://business.nikkei.com/atcl/NBD/19/world/00778/ - https://business.nikkei.com/atcl/gen/19/00141/021900096/ - https://business.nikkei.com/atcl/gen/19/00840/021900007/ - https://business.nikkei.com/atcl/gen/19/00847/021800001/ - https://jp.reuters.com/world/us/OAQYDZSXJNP4RDDLJMZSNSNAPY-2026-02-23/ - https://jp.reuters.com/world/security/A473DY4PMJPRZKAIMHY3UAQFUY-2026-02-23/ - https://jp.reuters.com/markets/japan/5AAFL6WUTRIPZIZRC34SJYGIGA-2026-02-23/ - https://jp.reuters.com/markets/japan/GALYHDMFOZIONEMM5CXLN34B34-2026-02-23/ - https://jp.reuters.com/world/security/E4FI6TLNGNIN5HO34EY27G6COM-2026-02-23/ - https://news.yahoo.co.jp/pickup/6570992?source=rss - https://news.yahoo.co.jp/pickup/6570960?source=rss - https://news.yahoo.co.jp/pickup/6570963?source=rss - https://news.yahoo.co.jp/pickup/6570924?source=rss - https://news.yahoo.co.jp/pickup/6570989?source=rss - https://www.asahi.com/articles/ASV2R5CQBV2RUHBI01QM.html?ref=rss - https://www.asahi.com/articles/ASV2N1W39V2NULFA00XM.html?ref=rss - https://www.asahi.com/articles/ASV2N1T70V2NULFA00WM.html?ref=rss - https://www.asahi.com/articles/ASV2Q1PZJV2QULFA01DM.html?ref=rss - https://www.asahi.com/articles/ASV2Q1GWVV2QULFA035M.html?ref=rss
Gemini AIで自動生成されたポッドキャストです。 元記事の著作権は各メディアに帰属します。
